extraction.one_line_summary: POLANC attacked with 4.1km remaining on Etna's headwind finish, dropped everyone for a 19-second solo victory over ZAKARIN.
tactical_patterns: POLANC attacked into headwind finish instead of waiting, exploiting that others couldn't respond in unfavorable conditions despite feeling strong.
GAVIRIA sprinted intermediate points early stage, signaling genuine three-week GC points ambition rather than stage-hunting mentality.
JUNGELS took pink jersey by limiting losses on Etna rather than attacking, conservative approach when rivals faltered.

rider_signals.POLANC Jan: positive: Won biggest career victory by attacking 4.1km out in headwind when others expected cooperation
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: Crashed twice during stage, finished 19 seconds down despite surviving to final group
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: Contested intermediate sprint targeting overall points jersey, indicating three-week racing commitment
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: Took pink jersey by defensive riding on first mountain stage when favorites couldn't separate
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Followed key moves on Etna, only 6 seconds behind JUNGELS in GC after mountain test
